channel.title: Monte Carlo Methods and Applications
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Monte Carlo Methods and Applications

item.title: Adaptive Bayesian bandwidth based on LPE kernel for asymmetric kernel density
item.description: Article by Héctor Araya DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mcma-2024-2021

item.title: New contribution to Luria–Delbrück distribution. Stability property and estimation
item.description: Article by Héctor Araya DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mcma-2024-2024

item.title: Mixed space coupled hidden Markov model
item.description: Article by Héctor Araya DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mcma-2024-2025

item.title: Evaluating the performance and robustness of PIR and QIR maintenance strategies using Monte Carlo method
item.description: Article by Héctor Araya DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mcma-2025-2001

item.title: Convergence of a particle Monte Carlo algorithm for scalar conservation laws
item.description: Article by Héctor Araya DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mcma-2025-2002

item.title: Generalized Hermite process: Tempering, properties and applications
item.description: Article by Héctor Araya DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mcma-2025-2003
